meta.title: NexSystems - Web, software, and automation for companies
meta.description: We design and build strategic websites, custom software, and automation for companies that want to grow with more order and better processes.

hero.eyebrow: Web, software, and automation • Costa Rica
hero.sub: We create strategic websites, custom software, and automations that organize your operation, capture better opportunities, and reduce manual work.
hero.mini: Strategy, design, and development connected to the business.
hero.trust_1: Strategic websites that explain your offer and open business conversations.
hero.trust_2: Custom software to organize sales, clients, bookings, or internal processes.
hero.trust_3: Automation and integrations to reduce repetitive tasks and improve follow-up.
hero.panel_sub: A well-planned solution connects digital presence, internal operation, and commercial follow-up.
hero.panel_item_1_desc: Centralize inquiries, forms, opportunities, and the next commercial step.
hero.panel_item_2_desc: Less scattered spreadsheets and more information available to decide.
hero.panel_item_3_desc: Reminders, notifications, and integrations ready to operate.

problem.title: Many companies grow with disconnected tools, manual processes, and a website that does not support the operation.
problem.subtitle: When digital presence, sales, and internal management do not work together, the team loses time, opportunities, and visibility.

cards.title: The website does not explain everything you do
cards.desc: Your company may offer more than a nice page, but visitors cannot quickly understand your solutions or next step.

cards.title: Bookings, sales, or clients are scattered
cards.desc: WhatsApp, spreadsheets, emails, and forms stay disconnected, making follow-up harder.

cards.title: Too many repetitive tasks
cards.desc: Confirmations, reminders, reports, and manual replies consume time that could be used to sell or operate better.

cards.title: No clear data to decide
cards.desc: If you do not know where opportunities come from or which process gets stuck, optimization becomes guesswork.

cards.title: Technology does not scale with the business
cards.desc: What solved things at the beginning starts falling short when there are more clients, more services, or a larger team.

services.title: Web, software, and automation moving in the same direction
services.copy: We build digital solutions around each company's stage, operation, and goals. Each scope is defined around the real business need.

items.name: Strategic web
items.desc: Websites, landing pages, and digital experiences that explain your offer better and make contact easier.

items.name: Custom software
items.desc: Internal apps, portals, and dashboards that help manage clients, sales, bookings, or critical information.

items.name: Automation and integrations
items.desc: We connect tools and automate repetitive steps so the team can move with less friction.

items.name: Analytics and optimization
items.desc: Measurement and data reading to understand which channel, page, or process creates real opportunities.

solutions.title: Solutions NexSystems can develop for your company
solutions.copy: We start from real needs: capture, sell, book, serve, organize, and automate. Each solution is defined around your operation without promising finished products.

items.title: Bookings and appointments
items.description: Flows for businesses that need to schedule services, confirm time slots, and reduce manual coordination.
items.result: Fewer back-and-forth messages and a clearer agenda.

items.title: Tickets and events
items.description: Experiences to promote events, receive registrations, or sell access based on the commercial model.
items.need: Centralize registration, event information, and follow-up.
items.result: A more professional flow to capture attendees and manage demand.

items.title: Sales and clients
items.description: Simple systems to receive opportunities, classify clients, and follow up without losing context.
items.need: Know which opportunity arrived, its current status, and who should respond.
items.result: More commercial order and fewer forgotten opportunities.

items.title: Academies and memberships
items.description: Portals to organize information, access, payments, or communication with students and members.
items.need: Manage community, content, or recurring requests.
items.result: A more orderly experience for members and administrators.

items.title: Client portal
items.description: Private spaces to share documents, progress, requests, or service information.
items.need: Reduce scattered emails and give each client more visibility.
items.result: More clarity in the relationship and less manual follow-up.

items.title: Automation
items.description: Flows that connect tools, send alerts, and remove repetitive steps from the operation.
items.need: Move information forward without relying on copy and paste.
items.result: Faster, traceable processes that are easier to supervise.

showcase.title: Projects that show web, software, and digital operations capability
showcase.copy: A selection of real work: commercial brands, digital catalogs, and internal systems built to operate with more clarity.

why.title: Direct execution to build useful solutions, not just attractive screens
why.copy: We are in launch stage as a brand, but we work with business judgment, technical structure, and direct collaboration for companies that need to grow with more order.

cards.title: Direct collaboration
cards.desc: You speak with the person defining structure, design, and development.

cards.title: Commercial judgment
cards.desc: Every decision should help capture, organize, or automate better.

cards.title: Modern foundation
cards.desc: We work with a current stack, strong performance, and architecture prepared to evolve.

cards.title: Long-term thinking
cards.desc: What we launch leaves room to add integrations, data, and new features.

process.title: From business need to operating digital solution
process.subtitle: We work through a clear sequence to understand the problem, prioritize what matters, and build without inventing unnecessary complexity.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.desc: We understand goals, current process, channels, constraints, and improvement opportunities.

steps.title: Solution map
steps.desc: We define scope, main flow, required data, integrations, and success criteria.

steps.title: Design and prototype
steps.desc: We organize the experience, messages, and key screens before development.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: We build the website, system, or automation with focus on performance, clarity, and maintenance.

steps.title: Launch and improve
steps.desc: We publish, measure, adjust, and leave priorities for the next iteration.

lead.title: Tell us what you need to build or optimize
lead.subtitle: We will reply with an initial read on the opportunity, likely scope, and next steps.
lead.name: Name
lead.message: What do you need to solve
lead.message_placeholder: Tell us which process you want to organize, automate, or improve.
lead.success: Done. We received your request and will contact you soon.
lead.error: We could not submit the form. Please try again.

ctaFinal.title: If your digital operation needs more than a website, we can help structure the next step.
ctaFinal.subtitle: Strategic web, custom software, and automation with business focus.

footer.desc: We develop strategic websites, custom software, and automation for companies that want to grow with more order.

validation.name_min: Name must have at least 2 characters.
validation.company_min: Company must have at least 2 characters.
validation.url_invalid: Please enter a valid URL (include https://).
validation.message_min: Tell us a little more so we can understand the need.
validation.message_max: Message must be 1200 characters or less.
